titleStmt.title: SII 10.717: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 717. (A.R. No. 358 of 1905.) ON A BEAM IN THE ĀSTHĀNA-MAṆḌAPA OF THE TEMPLE OF AMARĒŚVARA AT BŌṆI, BIMLIPATAM TALUK, VIZAGAPATAM DISTRICT. Ś. 1193 (?).

summary.p: Records gift of a perpetual lamp, a garden and a well to the temple of Amarēśvara by General Umāpati during the reign of Bhānudēva, son of Narasiṅghadēva and grandson of Bhīma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakasamāsu śivāṁbakacaṁḍikāśaśiniśānimitāsu kavipriya kṛtamādhava māsi śitāṣṭamī manunutēsitu tāmrava¨rṇādikaṁ . svasti śrīmati śāsati trija gatīgī
tapratāpasphuratkī¨rttiḥ śrījitajaṁbhavairivibhavē śrībhānudēvē mahīṁ . bhīmō yasya pitāmahōtimahitō dēvēśitu¨ryyatpitā vīraśrīnarasiṁghadēvanṛpatiḥ .
trailōkyamānyōbhavat . śēṣō nūnamanūnamauḷiviḷasanmāṇikyamāḷāmiṣā ddyattē jaḥkaṇikābhirēva vidhurō majjatphaṇigrāmaṇīḥ pātāḷāṁbhasi kiṁccaya
jhaṁkārināsāviḷairuddhūtō gaganē raviściramasābuḍḍīnapa¨rnnāyatē . jātarūparu civīcibhāvanājātarūpakamajātaśātravāḥ bhūṣaṇasya jagatōpi bhūṣaṇaṁ prādi śattripu
ravairikiṁkaraḥ . pradīpamamaraprabhōrakhiḷalōkaśōkacchidō mudē puravighasmarajvaḷana jātadīpāvaḷērumāpatirumāpatiścaraṇarēṇurākalpakaṁ nnivēdayadaśaṁsayaṁ
śivamahimni lōkōttarē . punnāganurapunnāga caṁpakaiḥ pāṭaḷābakuḷāśōka vasanādimahīruhaiḥ kānanaṁ nandanavanaspa¨rddhaśraddhāḷuvaibhavaṁ cakōrāmaranāthasya sēnāpatirumāpatiḥ .
ni¨rbbāṇani¨rmmaḷasvāntarūpaṁ kūpavā patirumākāntasa maśrāntamanōrathaḥ . yēnāsīnaṁ nṛpatipariṣanmaṇḍanībhūya bhūyō yātaṁ yēna ttripurajayinō dhāma vāmā
¨rtthavāmaṁ pītā yēnākhiḷabhavana ssanāthāstēnaitēna tribhuvana patē randhuradhvanyabandhuḥ . srutamamṛtamadhaḥ kimandhu sindhōḥ phaṇibhavanē bhava daṁbu kiṁ tadēva kimatha ta
bhūdasmi na jaḷamiti saṁkitamēṇa lōcanābhiḥ . śrī
Digital edition of SII 10.717 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
